decisions.rationale: sv create v0.16.1 embeds SvelteKit config in vite.config.ts but separate svelte.config.js is required for svelte-check and IDE tooling to pick up mdsvex preprocessor. Created svelte.config.js with full kit config; vite.config.ts simplified to enhancedImages() + sveltekit() + vitest.
npm latest is 4.4.3 but Zod 4 breaks z.string().date() used in frontmatterSchema. Pinned to 3.x to avoid API migration cost in Wave 0.
Verified no config-breaking changes for Plan 01 simple setup. environment: 'jsdom' + basic include config unchanged in v4.

decisions.decision: Vitest projects config in vite.config.ts (no separate vitest.config.ts)
decisions.rationale: Vitest 4 supports projects array in vite.config.ts. Two projects: unit (jsdom, tests/unit/**) and scripts (node, tests/scripts/**).

decisions.decision: pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies added for core-js, puppeteer, sharp
decisions.rationale: These packages have legitimate build scripts (polyfill build, browser download, native binding). Added to package.json pnpm config to allow future installs without --approve-builds prompt.
